title: viola × eclipes
intro: Viola × eclipes, also known as the hybrid pansy or Eclipsed pansy, is a cross between Viola x wittrockiana and Viola x hybrida, resulting in a unique and visually striking plant with distinctive flower colors. Traditionally used in herbal medicine, Viola × eclipes is valued for its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties, which make it a useful remedy for respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs. The plant's leaves and flowers have been used to create herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and salves, to treat a range of health issues, including digestive problems and skin irritations. Drinking a tea made from Viola × eclipes has been reported to have a calming effect on the nervous system, promoting relaxation and reducing stress levels.
